+        "description": "### Changelog category (leave one):\n- New Feature\n\n### Changelog entry (a user-readable short description of the changes that goes to CHANGELOG.md):\nSupport JWT authentication in `clickhouse-client`\r\n\nJWT authentication will be available only in ClickHouse Cloud.\n\n### Documentation entry for user-facing changes\r\n\n> Information about CI checks: https://clickhouse.com/docs/en/development/continuous-integration/\n\n---\n### Modify your CI run:\n\nIf your merge the PR with modified CI you\n\nChecked\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
